twitter_thread: 88% of software projects still use C, despite Zig offering 5x faster compilation and better memory safety.
Zig's compiler reduces build times by 75%, letting devs focus on coding instead of waiting.
Accenture's AI Adoption Maturity Model helps 40% of organizations scale AI successfully, but 60% still struggle.
Software funding has dropped 25% since 2020, with AI-focused projects accounting for 30% of all deals.
Using Zig and AI Adoption Maturity Model can cut AI project failure rates from 60% to 20%.
What's the biggest obstacle you've faced when trying to integrate AI into your existing codebase? #aiadoption #softwaredevelopment

Meanwhile, Accenture's AI Adoption Maturity Model is helping 40% of organizations successfully scale AI, but 60% of projects still fail due to poor planning. Since 2020, software funding has dropped 25%, with AI-focused projects making up 30% of all deals. By leveraging Zig and AI Adoption Maturity Model, organizations can reduce AI project failure rates from 60% to 20%.
